title: flush

messages.description: sends note off for hanging notes
sets the pitch part of the note message
sets a pitch/velocity pair of a note message
sets the velocity part of the note message
the pitch part of a note message
the velocity part of a note message

methods.description: clears the hanging notes that [flush] keeps track off

body: Like a "panic button", [flush] keeps track of Note-on messages that weren't switched off and "flushes" them by sending corresponding note-offs when it receives a bang.
